question: sejauh

answer: to be related / to have relations

question: memilikinya
answer: to have it / to possess it

question: menunggumu
answer: to wait for you (verb with object suffix)

question: berlaku
answer: to apply / to be valid (law / rule)

question: menjatuhkan
answer: to drop / to bring down / to overthrow

question: sepasang
answer: a pair (of things that come in twos)

question: kerjanya
answer: his / her work / the way they work

question: set
answer: set (group / collection; loan but adapted usage)

question: menjaganya
answer: to take care of it / him / her

question: keadaannya
answer: the condition / situation (of it / him / her)

answer: to make / turn into (cause something to become)

question: kubiarkan
answer: I let it / him / her (intentional action)

question: liat
answer: tough / sticky (informal of liat / lihat ambiguity)

question: penyimpanan

question: kuambil
